mapper.select: SELECT u.id as userId, u.account, u.name, u.gender, u.phone, u.email, u.state, u.main_dept as mainDept, u.join_time as joinTime FROM org_user u INNER JOIN org_user_department ud ON u.id = ud.user_id WHERE ud.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND ud.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id as userId, u.account, u.name, u.gender, u.phone, u.email, u.state, u.main_dept as mainDept, u.join_time as joinTime FROM org_user u INNER JOIN org_user_department ud ON u.id = ud.user_id WHERE ud.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND ud.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
